backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that includes a blob storage mixin and exposes a simple healthCheck query returning a status string.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four completed features (region rename, email restore, phone restore, address restore) to the specific frontend component files they affect.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short descriptions for every frontend file, summarizing the purpose and key changes made to each component, config, and public asset.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for Verdier Couverture with full meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, canonical URL, and JSON-LD structured data targeting the Val-d'Oise / Île-de-France market.
frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.h: Minimal HTML file used to verify ownership of the site with Google Search Console via the google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde token.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the production sitemap at https://verdiercouverture.fr/sitemap.xml.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: Single-URL XML sitemap for the production domain https://verdiercouverture.fr/ with monthly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders all landing page sections (Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, Footer) each wrapped in a named ErrorBoundary that silently suppresses errors in production.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section displaying company history, stats, and three strength cards with all region references updated to Île-de-France and defensive image error handling.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: A contact section component with a form that composes a mailto link from user input (name, email, phone, subject, message) and displays company contact details like phone, email, address, and hours.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying brand info, contact details, service links, and navigation links with smooth-scroll behavior, plus a legal links section and copyright year.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, company tagline, CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to contact and services sections, and quick phone/email links.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar that turns opaque on scroll, with desktop nav links, a phone CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu, all using smooth-scroll to page sections.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: SEO-focused section listing ~40 served cities in Val-d'Oise and related roofing service keywords as tag clouds, targeting local search visibility for Verdier Couverture.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of six roofing services (e.g., réfection, zinguerie, isolation) each with an image, description, and feature list. Handles broken images by hiding them and applying a fallback background color.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a 3-column grid of six customer testimonials with star ratings, names, locations, and formatted dates. Includes a reusable StarRating component and safe date formatting utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useHealthCheck hook that calls the backend actor's healthCheck method via React Query, returning 'unavailable' on error or when the actor is not ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS base styles, a warm earthy oklch-based design token system (light and dark modes), and reusable component utility classes like btn-terracotta and card-service.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom oklch brand colors (terracotta, slate, offwhite), serif/sans font families, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Verdier Couverture project, including existing features, known issues, and pending fix requests related to correcting contact/profile info (region, email, phone, address) across frontend components.
